posts.title: 博客搭建笔记
posts.text: 19年底弄过一次，几个月前折腾电脑翻车了重新装了个系统，Github上面的仓库也在但我还是把以前的那个删了新建了一个，希望这个可以用久一点，记录学习过程中遇到的问题以及解决办法。 The following is a record of the process of building the blog First install node，Go to the official website and download the LTS version.cmd node-v npm -v Domestic with Taobao mirror source for the next operation will be faster (with a ladder can be used without)npm install -g cnpm --registry=https://registry.npm.taobao.org-g global installcnmp -v Then use cnpm install hexo framecnpm install -g hexo-clihexo -v Go to the blog directory G: & cd/Project/BlogCerate hexo framehexo initA blog post will be generated automaticallyhexo s (s-server)Then enter the URL http://localhost:4000/ view create new bloghexo new "blog name"Use vim,notepad or Typora writing contentAfter save exit hexo cleanGenerate web pageshexo g(g-generate) Restart heox sYou can see the previous blog on the localhost cnpm install --save hexo-deployer-git The following warnings may apply Verion 9 of Highlight.js has reached EOL.It will no longer be supported or receive security updates in the future.Please upgrade to version 10 or encourage your indirect dependencies to do so. Need to install the latest versioncnpm install highlight.js@latestreference: https://github.com/highlightjs/highlight.js/issues/2882 Create a repository in GitHub which named ooblivion(name).github.iohttps://github.com/ooblivion/ooblivion.github.io.git notepad _config.ymlEnd of document 123type: 'git'repo: git@github.com:ooblivion/ooblivion.github.io.gitbranch: master git bashhexo d Change themegit clone https://github.com/fluid-dev/hexo-theme-fluid.git themes/fluid git clone https://github.com/ppoffice/hexo-theme-icarus.git themes/icarus notepad _config.ymlhexo cleanhexo ghexo shexo d Conlusionwe need git node.jsThemehttps://hexo.fluid-dev.com/https://github.com/fluid-dev/hexo-theme-fluidReference手把手教你从0开始搭建自己的个人博客 |无坑版视频教程| hexoThanks to Codesheep hexo常用命令hexo n “博客名称” => hexo new “博客名称” #这两个都是创建新文章，前者是简写模式$ hexo p => hexo publish$ hexo g => hexo generate #生成$ hexo s => hexo server #启动服务预览$ hexo d => hexo deploy #部署 $ hexo server #Hexo 会监视文件变动并自动更新，无须重启服务器。$ hexo server -s #静态模式$ hexo server -p 5000 #更改端口$ hexo server -i 192.168.1.1 #自定义IP$ hexo clean #清除缓存，网页正常情况下可以忽略此条命令 参考网站https://juejin.cn/post/6844903713811890189 夜间模式https://blog.asahih.com/hexo-icarus-night-mode/hexo s 报错https://www.haoyizebo.com/posts/710984d0/ 新文章模板123456789101112---title: {{ title }}tags:categories:description:date: {{ date }}---点击阅读前文前, 首页能看到的文章的简短描述<!-- more --><!-- markdownlint-disable MD041 MD002--> # 防止 markdownlint 报错 hexo 分类和标签分类(categories)具有顺序性和层次性。Hexo 不支持指定多个同级分类。 标签(tags)没有顺序和层次。 123456categories:- Diary- Lifetags:- PS3- Games 以上会使分类 Life 成为 Diary 的子分类, 而不是并列分类。 博客的其他配置 SearchInstall search plugin npm install hexo-generator-searchdb –save blog_config.yml add to the end 12345search: path: search.xml field: post format: html limit: 10000 next_config.yml false->true 12local_search: enable: true 新建页面$ hexo new page “tags”$ hexo new page “categories”$ hexo new page “about”分类有顺序，标签没顺序 all done
